hero.tagline: I design and ship complete web products — from database to UI — with Node.js, React, and TypeScript.

about.title: About Me
about.bio: Full Stack Developer with 4+ years of experience building and shipping end-to-end production applications. I work across the entire stack — NestJS REST APIs, PostgreSQL and MongoDB databases, and React/Next.js frontends — delivering complete products independently or in cross-functional teams.

contact.title: Contact
contact.cta_subtitle: Have a project in mind or just want to talk? I'm always open to new opportunities.
contact.form_success: Message sent! I'll get back to you soon.
